Banner.Description: I have 6 years of experience developing end to end containerized distributed microservices based backend systems and technological solutions to make the web a better place. I focus on writing and refactoring clean, reusable, and scalable code in NodeJS and Python, applying good practices and development standards.
AboutMe.Title: About me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: In 7 years of experience I've covered many roles: System Analyst, Senior Backend Developer, Data Engineer, and Technical Leader. I love contributing my knowledge to create new things that help solve problems.

My capabilities also include implementing improvements in systems, optimizing sites, suggesting and executing ideas that add value to the project I'm working on. I also program things for my personal and fmily use, whether as a hobby or for utility.

I am experienced in backend RestAPI, No-SQL, Microservices, End-To-End Backend Solutions with Node.JS. Have worked on Open Source Technologies like Elasticsearch, RabbitMQ, Redis, Docker, kubernetes. Proficient in API integration, Systems Integration, Data Streaming and Cloud Computing.

Capable of implementing Microservices Architecture. Consersion of Monoliths to Microservices. Also have worked with several freelance projects with lot of product based startups and handled multiple projects simultaniously.
Have 2+ years of experience in US Healthcare (FHIR, HL7), 2+ years in CRM systems, and 2+ years in Logistics platforms.
I architect solutions from ground up and implement them end to end. Also have close to 1.5 years of experience in Angular.

Have implemented serverless systems with Azure (Functions, API Management, Event Bus, AzureAD, Azure Log Analytics, etc), AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Event Bridge, CloudWatch, etc) and GCP (Cloud Functions, Firebase, Cloud Run, etc).
Some of the technologies that I have trained and worked on include (but are not limited to):
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Senior NodeJS developer
Description: Architected NestJS microservices for healthcare streaming 1M+ messages daily.
Backend Data Processing and NLP Development.
Ownership of EMR lab order workflows and resolved critical production issues
Mentored 4 junior engineers, improving code review turnaround by 30%.
Developed critical scripts to migrate GBs of data from exported CSV files from client data sources into 4medica systems with fault tolerance and retry mechanisms.
Introduced schedulers with Bull MQ and Bull Dashboard for monitoring. Increased retry resilience by 50%.
Automated support processes with email alerts which provide insights to the production team to error details and actions. Increasing production error resolution times by 50%.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Senior Associate
Description: Confluent Kafka Developer, creating and optimizing Kafka streams, connectors for various applications and systems. Developer data streaming pipelines using Azure stack.
Full stack developer providing performence enhancements, technical support and feature addition and updates to exisitng invoice application used by PwC US.
Responsible for improving performance of existing systems by enforcing asynchronous processing and caching where ever possible.
Creation and maintenance of data pipelines.
Creating middlewares in NodeJS for other systems use seamlessly.
Providing training to freshers on NodeJS.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Senior Backend developer
Description: Creation of several in systems for Pursuit from scratch.
Creating plugins to add the necessary monitoring features in Azure App Insights.
Development of several applications based on healthcare which was used by around 1000 users.
Providing guidance and leading team of 5 to create and maintain applications like Travmeds, IgniteXHealth
Implementation og Google SSO and Azure AD SSO for several systems.
Go to person for anything backend and Azure.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Backend Consultant Freelance
Description: Wrote the whole API layer from scratch into seperate microservices
Whatsapp API integration, message queue integration, Redis cache
Wrote Docker images for each microservice and also a docker-compose for staging environment.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Software developer
Description: Backend Data Processing and NLP Development.
Data Preprocessing of large structured and unstructured raw data from Tesseract OCR and segmenting data into files
Creation of APIs with NOdeJs

Experience.Jobs.Title: Product Engineering Services Trainee
Description: Creation of test autmation framework from scratch.
Decreasing testing time by 10 hours and improving efficiency of QA.

FeatureProjects.Title: My projects
FeatureProjects.Label: Featured Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: SSO Auth File Stream Service
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: This is a SSO authentication and file streaming service built with NodeJS, NestJS and TypeScript. It provides secure authentication and file streaming capabilities which can be used by clients. Ideally used for quick file demos and streaming videos.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Metro Laundry
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: This is a laundry management system for a client in Baharen for Ultera Systems. I was responsible for the bakckend which was a NodeJS Monolith. Database used was PostgreSQL and the ORM used was Prisma. Backend has been created from scratch.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Travmeds
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Monitoring application for Medicine Management and Doctor location search. I was responsible for the NodeJS backend APIs in the GCP Cloud and database was Firebase.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Gmail Cleaner
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Application to delete Gmails from personal gmail account. Frontend is made in Angular Backend made in NestJS. MongoDB used as database. Application uses NestJS backend workers listening to RabbitMQ. As Rabbit gets message cleaning process started by the backend worker. It will clean all emails from all domains mentitned by the user.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Countries viewer
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: An interface that consumes an API of countries with which you can view a list of countries, see details of each country, filter by name and region. It also has a dark mode to switch between dark and light themes.

Contact.Title: Get in touch!
Contact.Content: I will be happy to receive your contact if you want to talk about new opportunities. Write me, and I will reply as soon as I see your message. Simple one-page design that features a profile letter with basic information about a person.
